summary: Strong favourites for Group E with a dominant 4-2-3-1 — 2nd in Euro qualifying for control — but with plenty of unknowns.
style: 4-2-3-1 — complete domination (2nd in Euro qualifying), wingers free to take 1v1s, a roaming front four, fluid fullbacks (invert then overlap), rest-defence to counterpress and recover.
strengths: Wingers with freedom in 1v1s and a creative roaming front four

keyPlayers.name: Florian Wirtz
keyPlayers.note: Pacey dribbler & 1v1 (53.5% success), creative final pass (60 chances created), 8 goal involvements in a 'poor' season; his link with Raum overlapping is key

tactics: Dominate the ball, free the wingers, roam with the front four and recover via counterpressing. Favourites, but with several unknowns to resolve.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
